choices.name: CommunityEval
choices.choiceText: I committed to being connected and vulnerable with God's people.

choices.name: EvalSalvation
choices.choiceText: I started a new relationship with God by saying “yes” to Jesus.

choices.name: FamilyLifeToday
choices.choiceText: FamilyLife Today with Dave and Ann Wilson

value.stringValue: FamilyLife Today with Dave and Ann Wilson

choices.name: FLCruStaff
choices.choiceText: A FamilyLife or Cru staff member

choices.name: Group
choices.choiceText: Tell me how easy it is to lead a small group

choices.name: Invite
choices.choiceText: Tell me how to invite others to a getaway

choices.name: Local
choices.choiceText: Tell me about FamilyLife Local in my area

choices.name: RecommitEval
choices.choiceText: I recognized I need to submit myself more to the Spirit rather than my flesh.

Flow.interviewLabel: Staging Survey | Screen Flow | Event Evaluation {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Staging Survey | Screen Flow | Event Evaluation

fields.name: Do_you_have_Step_Children
fields.fieldText: Do you or your spouse have stepchildren?

fields.name: BlendedRating
fields.fieldText: If you attended the Blended Family breakout, please rate the value of the information presented to you—was it helpful for your family? (1 = Not at all helpful, 10 = Extremely helpful)

fields.name: CorporateRadioButtons
fields.fieldText: Often, businesses will offer Weekend to Remember scholarships as a benefit for their employees. Would you like to learn more about how your business can participate in the Corporate Sponsorship program?

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Thankyou
fields.fieldText: {!varContactName} there was a problem submitting your survey. Please ask one of our staff to assist.

fields.name: OverallRating
fields.fieldText: How would you rate the event overall? (1 = Not at all helpful, 10 = Extremely helpful)

fields.name: HowtoImprove
fields.fieldText: Is there anything we could have done to improve this event?

screens.name: Hear
screens.label: How did you hear about the Weekend to Remember?

fields.name: HowHeard
fields.fieldText: How did you hear about the Weekend to Remember? Select all that apply

fields.name: What_Impact_did_this_getaway_have_on_your_marriage
fields.fieldText: What impact did this getaway have on your marriage?

fields.name: RecommendRating
fields.fieldText: How likely are you to recommend this getaway to another couple? (1 = Not at all likely, 10 = Extremely likely)

fields.name: Multiple_Selection
fields.fieldText: Did you make any of these decisions this weekend? (Check all that apply)

fields.name: What_did_you_appreciate_most_about_the_speakers
fields.fieldText: What did you appreciate most about the speakers?

fields.name: Was_there_anything_the_speakers_did_or_said_that_diminished_your_experience
fields.fieldText: Was there anything the speakers did or said that diminished your experience? If so, please explain.

fields.name: Thankyou
fields.fieldText: Thank you so much {!varContactName} for sharing your experience with us. It allows us to continuously improve the Weekend to Remember experience.
